tasks.subject: Task 0: Workspace scaffold compiles green
tasks.description:
Create cargo workspace (members: crates/msrs-core, crates/msrs-transport, examples/echo) with workspace.dependencies cu29=1.0.0-rc2, statig=0.4, thread-priority=3, core_affinity=0.8, crossbeam-channel=0.5; rust-toolchain 1.95; .gitignore; skeleton crates build green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Cargo.toml","rust-toolchain.toml",".gitignore","crates/msrs-core/Cargo.toml","crates/msrs-core/src/lib.rs","crates/msrs-transport/Cargo.toml","crates/msrs-transport/src/lib.rs","examples/echo/Cargo.toml","examples/echo/src/main.rs"], "verifyCommand": "/tmp/xcargo build && /tmp/xcargo test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cargo build succeeds workspace-wide","cargo test exits 0 with 0 tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Trigger<In> enum
tasks.description:
Trigger::Tick(u64) + Trigger::Message(&In); message()/is_tick() helpers; unit tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/msrs-core/src/trigger.rs","crates/msrs-core/src/lib.rs"], "verifyCommand": "/tmp/xcargo test -p msrs-core trigger", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Tick carries ns timestamp, Message borrows payload","message()/is_tick() helpers behave","tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Effects<Out> write-capability
tasks.description:
Effects buffers outputs: emit/take/take_one/is_empty; exposes no clock/transport/runtime; unit tests for ordering + empty.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/msrs-core/src/effects.rs","crates/msrs-core/src/lib.rs"], "verifyCommand": "/tmp/xcargo test -p msrs-core effects", "acceptanceCriteria": ["emit/take FIFO + take_one + is_empty","no clock/transport/runtime accessor","tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Store convention trait
tasks.description:
Store marker trait with purity doc; sample pure store (Counter) unit-tested in isolation.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/msrs-core/src/store.rs","crates/msrs-core/src/lib.rs"], "verifyCommand": "/tmp/xcargo test -p msrs-core store", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Store marker trait with purity doc","sample pure store unit-tested in isolation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: RtConfig real-time controls
tasks.description:
RtConfig{scheduler,affinity} + SchedPolicy{Normal,Fifo}; apply() best-effort non-panicking; normal() ctor; tests for normal()+pin.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/msrs-core/src/rt.rs","crates/msrs-core/src/lib.rs"], "verifyCommand": "/tmp/xcargo test -p msrs-core rt", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RtConfig+SchedPolicy types","apply() best-effort non-panicking Result","normal() applies Ok; pin-to-core no panic"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Integration spike — copper-rs + statig signatures
tasks.description:
USER-GATE. Throwaway copper-rs source+sink app + minimal statig machine compile & run; capture exact rc2/0.4 signatures to notes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["spike/Cargo.toml","spike/src/main.rs","spike/copperconfig.ron","docs/superpowers/notes/copper-statig-signatures.md"], "verifyCommand": "cd /data/andrew/dev/orch/sources/msrs/spike && /tmp/xcargo run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["copper src+sink app builds+runs, prints i32, output captured","statig handle_with_context machine builds+runs, transition observed","notes record exact CuContext clock accessor, Resources/Freezable/Reflect needs, copper_runtime boilerplate, statig handler+dispatch"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: FsmTask<M> — the CuTask adapter
tasks.description:
FsmSpec helper + run_step (copper-agnostic, unit-tested) then FsmTask impls CuTask building Trigger from payload presence, writing take_one to output; Freezable+Reflect per Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/msrs-core/src/fsm_task.rs","crates/msrs-core/src/lib.rs","crates/msrs-core/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "/tmp/xcargo test -p msrs-core fsm_task", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FsmSpec+run_step copper-agnostic unit-tested (echo on Message, none on Tick)","FsmTask impls CuTask Input=CuMsg<In> Output=CuMsg<Out>","Trigger from payload presence; take_one written to output","Freezable+Reflect satisfied"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Transport trait + TransportDriver
tasks.description:
Transport trait (Inbound/Outbound/run) + TransportEvent; TransportDriver::spawn applies RtConfig on driver thread, returns DriverHandles; loopback round-trip test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/msrs-transport/src/transport.rs","crates/msrs-transport/src/driver.rs","crates/msrs-transport/src/lib.rs"], "verifyCommand": "/tmp/xcargo test -p msrs-transport", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Transport trait + TransportEvent","TransportDriver::spawn applies RtConfig, returns handles+join","loopback round-trips and joins Ok"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Ingress/Egress copper-rs bridge tasks
tasks.description:
ingress_step/egress_step copper-agnostic helpers (unit-tested) then IngressTask:CuSrcTask + EgressTask:CuSinkTask holding channel ends, using Task 5 signatures; Freezable+Reflect.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/msrs-transport/src/tasks.rs","crates/msrs-transport/src/lib.rs","crates/msrs-transport/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "/tmp/xcargo test -p msrs-transport tasks", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ingress_step/egress_step unit-tested pass-through+empty","IngressTask impls CuSrcTask, EgressTask impls CuSinkTask","channels injected, Freezable+Reflect satisfied"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Echo example end-to-end
tasks.description:
USER-GATE. EchoStore(pure)+EchoMachine(statig+FsmSpec) wired via RON DAG ingress->echo->egress + in-process transport; run e2e; replay unified-log for bit-for-bit determinism.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/echo/src/echo.rs","examples/echo/src/main.rs","examples/echo/copperconfig.ron","examples/echo/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "/tmp/xcargo run -p echo", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EchoStore pure, unit-tested in isolation","EchoMachine impls FsmSpec<String,String>+statig, echoes on Message","feeding messages yields echoed strings on outbound side in stdout","unified-log replay yields bit-for-bit identical output"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"]}
```
